svg.text: CROSS-BUILD HOST · four toolchains, one fat binary
BENCH RACK · seven Macs on a shelf
Old-Mac Quake II: build and bench rack
One Ubuntu workstation orchestrates · the Lion mini cross-builds for PPC and benches itself · five PPC + two Intel Macs run timedemo

g.text: x86_64 Linux · the only machine touched directly
Macmini2,1 · 2.33 GHz Core 2 Duo · GMA 950 · OS X 10.7.5 Lion · Apple's last Mac with PPC-targeting GCC 4.0.1 in /usr/bin

text.tspan: runs the four sub-builds serially under flock, then

g.text: stages .app with per-arch + per-machine cfgs in Contents/Resources/, rsyncs to target
Each runs +timedemo demo<n>.dm2; qconsole.log returns to Ubuntu, parsed into a CSV row tagged with the commit hash
